title: Llama 3 model composition (LlamaForCausalLM)
description:
Goal: 

Acceptance criteria:
- 

Compose the Llama 3 architecture from existing ferrotorch primitives. New file: ferrotorch-nn/src/models/llama.rs (or preferably a new ferrotorch-llama crate so model zoos live outside ferrotorch-nn core).

Structs:
- LlamaConfig: from HfTransformerConfig or direct fields.
- LlamaAttention: wraps MultiheadAttention with n_kv_heads (depends on GQA issue) + RotaryPositionEmbedding (base=rope_theta).
- LlamaMLP: SwiGLU with (gate_proj, up_proj, down_proj).
- LlamaDecoderLayer: RMSNorm -> Attention(+KVCache) -> residual -> RMSNorm -> MLP -> residual.
- LlamaModel: Embedding + N x DecoderLayer + final RMSNorm.
- LlamaForCausalLM: LlamaModel + lm_head (tied to embed_tokens when config.tie_word_embeddings).

HF weight name mapping (load_state_dict override):
- model.embed_tokens.weight -> embed.weight
- model.layers.{i}.self_attn.{q,k,v,o}_proj.weight -> layers[i].attn.{q,k,v,o}_proj.weight
- model.layers.{i}.mlp.{gate,up,down}_proj.weight -> layers[i].mlp.{gate,up,down}_proj.weight
- model.layers.{i}.input_layernorm.weight -> layers[i].input_norm.weight
- model.layers.{i}.post_attention_layernorm.weight -> layers[i].post_attn_norm.weight
- model.norm.weight -> norm.weight
- lm_head.weight -> lm_head.weight (or tied)

Acceptance:
- Random-init LlamaConfig matching Llama 3 8B compiles and runs a forward pass without panics.
- load_state_dict from a real HF Llama-3-8B checkpoint (after sharded loader lands) loads all weights with strict=true succeeding.

Depends on: GQA issue, KVCache-GQA issue, config parser issue.
